title: eriogonum correllii
intro: Eriogonum correllii, also known as Redstem Buckwheat or Coral Root, is a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Eriogonum correllii include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
